Discovery: CEO Anthony Noto has executed 5 separate open-market purchases in 2026 totaling ~$2.25M (~130,211 shares at avg $17.29), most recently June 16 ($250.8K at $18.06), with the stock down ~46% from its 52-week high of $32.73 and -33% YTD — classic CEO conviction buy into a deep drawdown.
value_picks.analyst_take: CEO's 5th consecutive open-market purchase (most recent June 16 at $18.06); earnings growth 101% YoY; PEG 0.8; 83.5% gross margin; $22-26 fair value

catalysts_general: Q1 2026 guidance raised to 'modestly exceed' 2025 full-year operating income. Premium CLX transpacific service captures elevated container rates. Hawaii/Pacific Island routes structurally protected from Middle East disruption. Source tier: 1 (earnings release + forward guidance).

Discovery: Hormuz crisis added a 40% surge in transpacific container rates to US West Coast; Matson's premium China CLX service captured elevated rate environments while its Hawaii/Pacific Island services are structurally insulated from Hormuz rerouting — the company beat earnings, raised operating income guidance, and has a $1B LNG-powered fleet renewal underway that cuts fuel cost exposure.
value_picks.analyst_take: Management raised 2026 guidance mid-year on sustained China freight demand strength; Pacific routes insulated from Hormuz; Fwd P/E 12.8; $1B LNG fleet renewal

Q4 FY2026: data center revenue exceeded $400M quarterly ($1.1B full year). Airedale division data center +158% YoY. $340 analyst target (+23%). Source tier: 2 (company press release).

Discovery: FY2026 data center revenues hit $1.1B (+73% YoY) and secured a landmark $4B+ cooling supply contract for 2027-2029; Q4 FY2026 quarterly net sales up 47% — smaller-cap picks-and-shovels cooling play with a multiyear revenue backlog locked in.
value_picks.analyst_take: $4B+ hyperscaler data center cooling contract 2027-2029 with $165M upfront payment; data center revenues $1.1B FY2026 (+73%); Airedale +158% YoY

value_picks.analyst_take: November 10 hard deadline when China partial RE export control suspension expires; $1.6B Commerce loan; co-blacklisted with MP by China; $40 analyst target (+87%) — tight sizing
